============================================================
llms.txt - DevUI Pencil Design System Component Directory
============================================================

# DevUI Design System | DevUI 设计系统
> Source: https://devui.design
> Format: Pencil .pen (Design-as-Code)
> Component Library: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
> Total Reusable Components: 706 variants across 60+ component groups

---

# COMPONENT DIRECTORY | 组件目录

## 1. 按钮 (Button)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
DESCRIPTION: 企业级按钮组件，支持主要/次要/图标文本/可下拉组合等类型
VARIANTS:
  - 按钮-主要 (12 variants): Size=[sm,md,lg] × Status=[default,hover,active,disabled]
  - 按钮-次要 (12 variants): Size=[sm,md,lg] × Status=[default,hover,active,disabled]
  - 按钮-图标文本按钮 (8 variants): Size=[sm,md] × Status=[default,hover,active,disabled]
  - 按钮-可下拉次要组合按钮 (24 variants): status × icon/number × 尺寸

## 2. 分页 (Pagination)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
DESCRIPTION: 分页导航组件，支持页码跳转
VARIANTS:
  - .页码 (8 variants): statuse=[default,hover,active,disabled] × type=[number,ellipsis]
  - 分页 Pagination (2 variants): 跳转=[true,false]

## 3. 标签 (Tag)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
DESCRIPTION: 标签组件，支持多种样式和颜色
VARIANTS:
  - 标签 (4 variants): Size=[md,lg] × Color=[green,orange]
  - 辅助标签 (4 variants): Size=[md,lg] × Color=[green,grey]
  - 常规标签 (2 variants): Size=[md,lg]
  - 线性标签 (6 variants): Size=[md,lg] × Color=[green,orange,red]

## 4. 面包屑 (BreadCrumbs)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
DESCRIPTION: 面包屑导航组件
VARIANTS:
  - .分隔符 (2 variants): separatorIcon=[default,next]
  - .基础面包屑组件 (4 variants): Status=[default,hover,active,ellipsis]
  - 面包屑组 (6 variants): number=[2,3,4,5,6,ellipsis]

## 5. 页签 (Tabs)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
DESCRIPTION: 多种风格页签组件（Pills/Wrapped/Icon/图标页签）
VARIANTS:
  - 页签 Pills 选项状态 (4 variants): status=[default,hover,disabled,active]
  - 页签 Wrapped 选项状态 (4 variants): status=[default,默认状态,悬浮状态,禁用状态]
  - 页签Pills组 (5 variants): number=[2,3,4,5,6]
  - 页签Tabs组 (5 variants): number=[2,3,4,5,6]
  - 页签 Wrapped组 (5 variants): number=[2,3,4,5,6]
  - . 页签 Icon-主组件 (12 variants): Status × Icon
  - 页签 Icon (2 variants): number=[2,3]
  - . 页签-图标-主组件 (4 variants): Status=[active,hover,default,disabled]
  - 页签-图标页签 (5 variants): number=[2,3,4,5,6]

## 6. 卡片 (Card)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
DESCRIPTION: 卡片组件，含基本卡片、带图卡片、项目卡片
VARIANTS:
  - 基本卡片 (3 variants): 状态=[默认,悬浮,悬浮-标题变蓝]
  - 带图卡片 (3 variants): 状态=[默认,悬浮,悬浮-标题变蓝]
  - 项目卡片 (3 variants): 状态=[默认,悬浮,悬浮-标题变蓝]
  - .有图标标题 (5 variants): 标题图标 × 右侧图标 × 尺寸
  - .无图标标题 (2 variants): 副标题=[on,off]
  - .信息展示 (4 variants): 图标=[on,off] × 尺寸=[md,lg]
  - .操作图标 (3 variants): 名称=[最近访问,设置,我创建的]

## 7. 选择框 (Select)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
DESCRIPTION: 下拉选择框组件，支持单选/多选
VARIANTS:
  - 下拉选择框 (10 variants): status × 选择状态 × 下拉面板
  - 下拉选择框-多选 (2 variants): [active,Default]
  - 下拉选项 (12 variants): status × 组件类型=[多选,单选,分组标题,分割线]
  - 内容下展 (16 variants): status × 组件类型 × icon
  - 表单项-下拉选择框 (5 variants): status=[noContent,disabled,hasContent,...]

## 8. 表格 (DataTable)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
DESCRIPTION: 数据表格组件，支持默认类和合并单元格
VARIANTS:
  - 默认类/表头单项 (varies): header-bg × position × contentType
  - 默认类/表体单项 (varies): position × contentType × status
  - 合并单元格/表头单项 (varies)
  - 合并单元格/表体单项 (103 variants): position × contentType × status
  - 表格 (4 variants): contentType × shadowType
  - .表体组件/树结构 (varies): 层级 × 状态
  - .表体组件/状态图标 (varies)
  - .操作列 (3 variants): number=[1,2,3]

## 9. 搜索框 (Search)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
DESCRIPTION: 搜索输入框组件
VARIANTS:
  - 搜索框-线框白底风格 (14 variants): iconPosition=[left,right] × Status=[default-noContent,disabled,disabled-entered,default-contentpresent,hover,activation-inputPending,activation-Entered]
  - 分类搜索 (8 variants): status × tag

## 10. 复选框 (Checkbox)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
DESCRIPTION: 复选框组件
VARIANTS:
  - 复选框 (9 variants): status=[noChecked,checked,halfChecked] × componentStatus=[default,hover,disabled]
  - 复选框文本组合 (9 variants): Status=[noChecked,checked,halfChecked] × componentStatus=[default,hover,disabled]

## 11. 输入框 (TextInput)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
DESCRIPTION: 文本和数字输入框组件
VARIANTS:
  - 文本输入框 (9 variants): status=[noContent,hasContent,danger,Success,disabled,disabled-hasContent,hover,focus,input]
  - 数字输入框 (8 variants): status=[default,hover,left-hover,right-hover,left-active,right-active,激活-中间输入,disabled]
  - 表单标题 (4 variants): required × helpTips
  - 表单项-文本输入框 (82 variants): status × required × helpTips × showExtraInfo × label

## 12. 筛选 (Filter)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
DESCRIPTION: 筛选组件，支持简易/复杂类型
VARIANTS:
  - .筛选-选项-单项 (2 variants): status=[default,hover+active]
  - 筛选选择面板 (4 variants): number=[3,4,5,6]
  - 筛选 (8 variants): status × type=[简易,复杂]

## 13. 顶部导航 (TopNavigation)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
DESCRIPTION: 顶部导航栏组件
VARIANTS:
  - 顶部导航栏 (2 variants): 种类=[default,占位]
  - 顶部导航栏-右侧图标 (6 variants): status=[default,hover+active]
  - 头像信息 (2 variants): status=[default,hover+active]
  - 菜单 (2 variants): status=[default,hover+active]
  - 菜单组 (5 variants): 菜单项目数量=[2,3,4,5,6]
  - 控制台 (2 variants)
  - 菜单按钮 (2 variants): status=[default,hover]

## 14. 侧边栏 (Sidebar - 工具链导航)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
DESCRIPTION: 侧边栏导航组件（工具链专用）
VARIANTS:
  - .二级菜单-展开 (3 variants): status=[default,hover,active]
  - .二级菜单-收起 (3 variants): status
  - .工具链专用导航-展开 (18 variants): status × 展开 × 二级菜单数量
  - .工具链专用导航-收起 (6 variants): 展开 × 二级菜单数量
  - .一级菜单-收起 (2 variants): status=[default,hover]
  - .热区按钮 (6 variants): status × 展开
  - .项目选项 (2 variants): status
  - .项目选项下拉面板 (3 variants): number=[1,2,3]
  - .选择项目 (4 variants): 展开 × 下拉
  - 工具链专用导航 (2 variants): 展开=[on,off]

## 15. 侧边导航-手风琴 (Accordion Sidebar)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
DESCRIPTION: 手风琴式侧边导航菜单
VARIANTS:
  - .一级 (5 variants): status=[default,expand,expand+hover,hover,active]
  - .二级 (8 variants): Property 1 × 显示VIP
  - .一级菜单展开 (8 variants): 选项数量 × 展开
  - 一级菜单组 (9 variants): 一级菜单数量=[1..9]
  - 侧边导航-手风琴/侧边栏

## 16. 表单项 (FormItem)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
DESCRIPTION: 表单项组合组件
VARIANTS:
  - 表单组件 (8 variants): showExtraInfo × 组件类型=[下拉选择,输入框] × 按钮

## 17. 头信息 (HeaderInfo)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
DESCRIPTION: 页面头信息组件，含面包屑标题和搜索
VARIANTS:
  - .头信息标题面包屑 (2 variants): status=[active,default]
  - .头信息标题面包屑组 (6 variants): 个数 × 尺寸
  - .代码健康度检查 (2 variants): status=[未检查,已检查]
  - .代码仓选项 (2 variants): status=[default,hover+active]
  - 头信息 (4 variants): 状态 × 搜索项数量

## 18. 业务组件 (Business Components)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
DESCRIPTION: 特定业务场景卡片组件
VARIANTS:
  - 左侧选择菜单卡片, banner卡片, banner, 公告卡片, 活动卡片, api-arts

## 19. 其他 (Others)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
  - 字母icon (26 variants): A-Z 字母图标
  - 卡片icon (3 variants): 名称=[默认项目,我的关注,归档]
  - .priority-flag (3 variants): 优先级=[低,中,高]
  - 计数徽章 (1 variant): 99+

---

# DESIGN TOKENS SUMMARY | 设计令牌摘要

## Colors | 颜色
- Brand Primary: #5e7ce0 (品牌色/按钮主要)
- Brand Active Bg: #f2f5fc (品牌色浅底)
- Text Primary: #252b3a (主要文字)
- Text Secondary: #8a8e99 (次要文字/占位符)
- Text Weak: #575d6c (弱化文字)
- Background: #ffffff (白色背景)
- Border: #adb0b8 (边框线)
- Divider: #dfe1e6 (分割线)
- Success: #50d4ab (成功/绿色标签)
- Danger: #f66f6a / #ff9685 (危险/红色)
- Warning: #fac532 (警告/黄色)
- Disabled Bg: #f5f5f5

## Typography | 排版
- Font Family: "Noto Sans SC", "HarmonyOS Sans SC", "Roboto"
- Body: 14px / normal / line-height 1.57
- Caption: 12px / normal / line-height 1.67
- Heading: 18px / bold (700)
- Page Title: 16px / medium (500)
- Title Weight: bold (700)
- Content Weight: normal

## Spacing | 间距
- Component Padding: 4px, 8px, 12px, 16px, 20px, 24px
- Component Gap: 4px, 8px, 10px, 16px
- Card Padding: [20px, 24px]
- Navigation Padding: [0, 8px]

## Corner Radius | 圆角
- Small: 2px (复选框)
- Default: 4px (按钮、标签、输入框)
- Medium: 6px (搜索框)
- Large: 8px (卡片)
- Round: 999px (头像)

## Shadows | 阴影
- Card Shadow: 0 1px 5.25px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)
- Navigation Shadow: 0 1px 5.25px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)
- Overlay Shadow: 0 4px 10.5px rgba(0,0,0,0.16)

---

# REFERENCE | 参考
- Design Specification: https://devui.design/design-cn/start
- Component Documentation: https://devui.design/components/get-start
- GitHub Repository: https://github.com/DevCloudFE/ng-devui
